mapper.sql: SELECT value_id, ticket_id, field_id, field_key_snapshot, field_name_snapshot, field_type_snapshot, normalized_value, display_value_snapshot, sort_order_snapshot, create_time FROM ticket_custom_field_value
mapper.select: WHERE ticket_id=#{ticketId} ORDER BY sort_order_snapshot, value_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_custom_field_value (ticket_id, field_id, field_key_snapshot, field_name_snapshot, field_type_snapshot, normalized_value, display_value_snapshot, sort_order_snapshot, create_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{fieldId}, #{fieldKeySnapshot}, #{fieldNameSnapshot}, #{fieldTypeSnapshot}, #{normalizedValue}, #{displayValueSnapshot}, #{sortOrderSnapshot}, #{createTime})
